calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-22-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: SCOTT BASSIN, APPEARING FOR AND WITH JAVIER REYES; RICHARD SPOTWOOD, APPEARING FOR LINDA HARRINGTON

BOTH COUNSELS AGREE WITH MR. SPOTWOOD'S ORDER. THE COURT TAKES THE ORDER UNDER SUBMISSION
JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN, REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN,CSR#11722; CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON;bALIFF:M. LOOS

Petition For Removal Of Administrator And Appointment Of Successor Administrator.
Off Calendar Aug-20-2007 Off Calendar

Petition For Removal Of Administrator And Appointment Of Successor Administrator.
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Continued To Aug-20-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Amended Petition For Letters Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Spotswood (Counsel for Linda Harrington, Petitioner); Dennis Vann (Counsel for the Estate of Ernestine Harris, Interested entity); Kenneth Gregory (Interested Person/Brother of Decedent).

After discussing the status of the real property, including the one-half interest of the Estate of Ernestine Harris and the alleged pending foreclosure of the mortgage on said property, the Court granted the Petition, signing the Order for same in open court.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.
